zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron於1434年出生在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同時，他的父親John de la Lynde II27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Mallet11歲。他於1460年與Edith Twynhoe在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1516年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特被列為high sheriff。他去世於1509年9月17日在英國英格蘭素可享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron于1434年出生在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同时，他的父亲John de la Lynde II27岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Mallet11岁。他于1460年与Edith Twynhoe在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1516年在英国英格兰薩默塞特被列为high sheriff。他去世于1509年9月17日在英国英格兰素可享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron was born in 1434, in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, his father, John de la Lynde II, was 27 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Mallet, was 11. He married Edith Twynhoe in 1460, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1516, his occupation is listed as high sheriff in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He died on 17 September 1509, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron est né en 1434, à Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John de la Lynde II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Mallet, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Edith Twynhoe en 1460, à Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1516, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1509, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England,: Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron 1434 in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de la Lynde II 27 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Mallet 11. Er hat 1460 in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England Edith Twynhoe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1516 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff in Somerset, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. September 1509 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron è nato il nel 1434 nel Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John de la Lynde II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Mallet, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Edith Twynhoe nel 1460, nel Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1516, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 17 settembre 1509, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baronが1434年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン クレンストーンで生まれた時，父John de la Lynde IIは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Malletは11歳であった。1460年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでEdith Twynhoeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1516年，イギリスイギリスソメルセトでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1509年9月17日にイギリスイギリススセックスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron(이)가 1434년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 클렌스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de la Lynde II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Mallet(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Edith Twynhoe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1516년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1509년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron nasceu em 1434, em Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de la Lynde II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Mallet, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Twynhoe em 1460, em Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1516, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1509, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ro.Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England,: Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron родился в 1434 г. в местности винтирбурн кленстоун, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de la Lynde II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Mallet, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Twynhoe в 1460 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1516 году он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 17 сентября 1509 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron nació en 1434, en Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de la Lynde II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Mallet, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Edith Twynhoe en 1460, en Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1516, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1509, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
